# diff-allowlist.txt — Cluster 4 e2e byte-for-byte comparison allowlist
#
# Lines in this file describe intentional format changes between legacy
# workflow artifacts and skill-based artifacts. Each line is a path-glob
# pattern followed by a description of the allowed diff.
#
# Format: <glob-pattern> :: <description>
#
# Diffs outside this allowlist cause a test failure (AC3).
#
# --- Allowed diffs ---
# (none yet — initial baseline assumes byte-for-byte parity)
